summary: Drafted the single paid provider smoke approval proposal. It asks for provider, credential source reference, model policy reference, max budget, expiry, approver, and approval_id while storing no secret values and not authorizing any real provider call by itself.
recommendation_for_human: Human decision is now required before any real API call: choose provider, credential source reference, model policy reference, max budget <= 1 USD, expiry, approver, and approval_id, or hold.
notes: No real provider call is authorized or executed.
